description.unified: Deals ??? Magic DMG to a random enemy 5times. Each hit stuns the target for [1 sec->0.5sec], and restores Mana by 100 when landing a Critical Hit. Non-hero enemies take additional Magic DMG per [Ember] stack.

Deals ??? Magic DMG to enemies in the target area and stuns them for [2 sec->1sec]. Non-hero enemies take ??? plus additional Magic DMG per [Ember] stack. Inflicts [(removed) 12] Ember stacks on hit targets.
Deals ??? Magic DMG to all enemies 5times. This attack applies [150%->160%] increased Critical DMG, and non-hero enemies take additional Magic DMG per [Ember] stack.

On hit, applies a stack of [Ember] to the target. When attacking a target at max stacks, restores Mana by 30. [Ember]: Deals ??? Magic Damage over Time every 1sec for 20sec, and stacks up to [12 times->10 times].

dark.unified: Mana cost increases by [1000->(added) 1000], but damage increases by [(added) 100%].

light.unified: When hitting an enemy with 10 or more [Ember] stacks, Magic DMG taken increases by [40%->20%] for [10 sec->5 sec].

dark.unified: When there are 5 or more enemies, Mana cost is reduced by [2->2000] for 10 sec. This effect can only trigger once every 10 sec.

light.unified: Each [Ember] stack increases the target’s Magic DMG taken by [(added) 1%]. [(removed) Reduces the target's M.DEF by 2.5% per Ember stack.]

dark.unified: Every 10 sec, stuns enemies with [Ember] for [2 sec->1 sec]. If the target has 10 or more [Ember] stacks, stuns for [3 sec->1.5 sec] instead.

description.unified: [Fireball] Reduces Mana Cost by [1->1000] and increases DMG by {0}%.

[Fire Rain] Increases DMG by [?%->20%]. Upon Critical Hit on an enemy with 5 or more stacks of Ember, Cooldown will be reduced by [5%->{0}%]. Upon killing an enemy with this Skill, Cooldown will be reduced by an additional [20%->5%].
[Flame Diffusion] Changes Ember max stacks to [(added) 14] and increases Ember DMG by {0}%. [(removed) Ember becomes irremovable and causes the target to take {0}% increased M.DMG per stack.]

dark.unified: [Ember] becomes [(added) non-dispellable], and applies [2 stacks->1 stack] [Ember] stack every second to all non-hero enemies. [(removed) increases the M.DMG the target takes by 30%]

description.unified: Critical Rate increases by [(added) {0}], Critical DMG increases by [(added) {1}], and Skill Attacks deal additional DMG equal to [{1}%->{2}%] per [Ember] stack on the target. [(removed) Increases ATK Spd by {0}]
Summons the soul of Primal Flame, Flenos, dealing ??? M.DMG to 5 enemies. When this skill deals DMG, increases DEF Penetration by [25->20] for 60 sec. This effect stacks up to 20 times.

2.from: Increases DMG by 50%. Each stack grants 2.5% ATK Boost effect.
2.to: Additionally increases ATK by 2.5% per stack.
2.unified: Additionally increases ATK by 2.5% per stack.
